steps.title: Identify what support requires
steps.content: Ortega and colleagues conclude the venom mitigates risk during feeding. Supporting evidence must show that E. coli can be a real feeding risk for C. granosus.

steps.title: Compare the findings
steps.content: Choice A weakens the risk; Choice C says the scorpion tends to avoid infected prey; Choice D concerns nonpathogenic bacteria. Choice B shows E. coli occurs in prey and can survive digestion. The answer is B.
